arts.ttl: Romano’s update hands Arsenal major boost in pursuit of Barca star with 73 goals & 64 assists
arts.sum: Arsenal’s hopes of landing Dani Olmo have received a significant boost as Barcelona struggle to secure the midfielder’s permanent registration. Fabrizio Romano has reported on X that Barcelona’s latest appeal to register Olmo, along with fellow signing Pau Víctor, has been rejected. arts.ttl: Fee set: Arsenal pursuing forward transfer, €70m needed to get deal done
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly remain interested in a potential transfer move for RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko, though he’ll cost at least €70million. Leipzig are surely going to find it hard to keep hold of Sesko, who has long been regarded as one of Europe’s top young forwards. arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Bukayo Saka replacement identified as Barcelona target Gunners star
arts.sum: There are concerns over Arsenal's squad depth after going nine points behind league leaders Liverpool and fans will be crying out for more additions next month to help them get back in the title race

arts.ttl: Gary Neville explains why Arsenal will STILL win the Premier League this term despite trailing table-toppers Liverpool by NINE points as he makes mid-season predictions with Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: The Gunners have endured a mixed first half of the season and currently sit third in the table, nine points behind leaders Liverpool ahead of their clash with Brentford on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank sends defiant message to Arsenal, Liverpool over Bryan Mbeumo interest
arts.sum: Brentford head coach sends a message to the likes of Arsenal and Liverpool over a potential transfer for Cameroon international Bryan Mbeumo

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney 'would be up for' Celtic return as Michael Stewart makes estimate for cut price Jota transfer
arts.sum: The Scotland star has been told he has no future at Arsenal and will be available on a free transfer next summer

arts.ttl: Massive Arsenal boost as Nico Williams replacement already known
arts.sum: Athletic Club have identified Championship top scorer Borja Sainz as the man to replace Nico Williams in 2025, according to Spanish media. At least that is according to Sport, which claims that the Bilbao giants have identified Norwich City hotshot Borja Sainz as a replacement for Williams.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'leading Chelsea & Liverpool' in race for Bundesliga star
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly leading Chelsea and Liverpool in the race to sign Egypt international Omar Marmoush from Bundesliga side Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Brentford and Brighton dealt blow in possible January move – Club’s decision communicated to agent
arts.sum: Over the last few months, Brentford and Brighton & Hove Albion have been linked with a move for Genoa midfielder Morten Frendrup. Earlier this month, it was suggested that the player was close to joining Brentford in the summer but the move never materialised. Previous reports said Brighton were an interested party for the player. arts.ttl: Arsenal 'Lead Race' to Sign 'Outrageous' Forward who Cannot Stop Scoring
arts.sum: Arsenal have been in the market for an attacker and they continue to be linked with a move for Omar Marmoush
